summary: Implemented a read-only Nushell human approval surface as a Nu plugin patch artifact. The command projects approval requests and optional operation queue rows into a single envctl_human_approval_surface table with mode, approval, and operation views plus allowed actions for opt-in, approve, deny, pause, and delegate flows.
title: Implement human approval commands
